observations.observation: Read config, story arc, slop hitlist, editor guide, author-technique anchors, and the Jaina/Sylvanas voice sheets before editing.
Confirmed polish-mode target file was v4b.md, not v4.md.
Mapped the chapter spine before cutting: road-pattern motif, Arthas refusal scene, Mal'Ganis phrase seed, Andorhal normality reveal.
Marked high-risk sections to preserve: Arthas entrance, Sylvanas aftermath lines, the farewell phrase, and the Andorhal reveal.
Used the voice sheets to keep Jaina precise but human and Sylvanas clipped without flattening her into monosyllables.
Trimmed early analysis paragraphs where Jaina restated the pattern after the image had already landed.
Compressed exposition around the Strahnbrad approach so the chapter reaches Arthas faster without losing the bruise under Jaina's hope.
Cut post-scene reflection after Arthas's refusal where the chapter repeated the same emotional beat before returning to the road.
Tightened the Andorhal approach by removing duplicate logistics phrasing while preserving the city's normal, working horror.
Reduced word count 4386 -> 4225. The draft was already lean, so the polish pass took only high-confidence cuts.
Removed memo-register phrasing in dialogue and narration where lines read like a briefing instead of a scene.
Cut negation scaffolding where the sentence already knew its destination.
Trimmed narrator explanation after social beats, especially around Arthas's public courtesy and Jaina's recognition of it.
Preserved load-bearing motif words such as road, pattern, and working when they carried the chapter's logic rather than repeating it.
Left the Mal'Ganis farewell untouched because the exact wording is a continuity trigger.
Cleaned Jaina's ask to Arthas so it sounded like an urgent argument, not an operations memo.
Rebuilt Arthas's most bureaucratic lines into prince-and-commander speech instead of staff-briefing language.
Changed Jaina's 'hierarchy' line to 'waiting for permission' so the cut stayed sharp but sounded spoken.
Reworked Cyndia's report line to remove modern report diction while keeping ranger brevity.
Verified quoted speech against the voice sheets: Jaina stays precise and urgent, Sylvanas stays dry and tactical, Arthas stays publicly reasonable.
Counted before and after words rather than reporting a vibes-only clean pass.
Checked dialogue-register offenders from the critic list and removed all eight targeted memo-phrasing hits.
Kept three flagged lines on purpose: 'The road had orders on it,' the farewell phrase, and the Andorhal reveal's normality contrast.
Validated that v5.md, notes JSON, and status JSON all exist at the polish-mode paths.
Did not flag for expansion in polish mode; this pass was register cleanup, not scene growth.

changes.before: The pattern would not stop arranging itself.
changes.after: The pattern would not stop clicking into place.

changes.before: But the grain had never been the whole thing. It was only the shell. Too clean, too durable, too willing...
changes.after: But grain was only the shell, clean enough to survive...

changes.before: Not the full answer.
changes.after: Cut the preamble and started at the missing turn.

changes.before: It wanted repetition. Time.
changes.after: Repetition. Time.

changes.before: Grain teams ahead. Dispatch riders ahead.
changes.after: Grain teams. Dispatch riders.

changes.before: Understanding more than she had yesterday should have comforted her.
changes.after: It should have comforted her.

changes.before: Not that this was monstrous; that was obvious.
changes.after: Removed the footnote and left the moral nausea in 'the work was good.'

changes.before: She had no right even to think that way.
changes.after: Removed the extra self-rebuke and let Antonidas carry the check.

changes.before: But the road had done enough work that hope now carried a bruise under it.
changes.after: But hope now carried a bruise under it.

changes.before: Not by features. By use.
changes.after: Not by features. By the way the command space bent around him.

changes.before: Good. Let him be uncomfortable.
changes.after: Good.

changes.before: It was an old skill of his, listening with enough attention...
changes.after: He had always known how to listen hard enough to make disbelief seem reasonable.

changes.before: Because whoever built it understands supply better than panic, and if you keep striking only what draws blood in daylight...
changes.after: Because whoever built it understands supply better than panic. Keep striking only what draws blood in daylight...

changes.before: Quarantine grain teams on the Andorhal approaches. Seize the records.
changes.after: Stop the grain teams on the Andorhal road. Take the records.

changes.before: I have a confirmed enemy in striking distance...
changes.after: Raiders are in reach...

changes.before: civilians under active attack
changes.after: civilians being dragged off right now

changes.before: I need certainty before I move troops off a live front.
changes.after: I need more than this before I pull troops off the line.

changes.before: I'll add my own authority to the warning... I will not gut this response...
changes.after: I'll add my name to the warning... I will not tear this response apart...

changes.before: So does hierarchy.
changes.after: So does waiting for permission.

changes.before: reports from Andorhal's grain exchanges come directly through the command tent by nightfall
changes.after: any trouble out of Andorhal's grain yards comes straight to the command tent by nightfall

changes.before: moving slow under escort traffic
changes.after: moving slow in the escort churn

changes.before: She could go back. Not to Dalaran. That road had burned behind her long ago. But back to the prince...
changes.after: She could go back to the prince...

changes.before: There was no missing sentence that would have fixed him.
changes.after: Removed the extra conclusion and returned to the road.

changes.before: The wrongness was too broad here, too spread out. Not one house. Not one granary.
changes.after: The wrongness was too broad to seize by one source.

changes.before: No visible checks on grain.
changes.after: No one's checking grain.

flags: Kept 'The road had orders on it.' — title motif and load-bearing chapter logic.
Kept 'May the stars keep your road.' verbatim — continuity trigger for Mal'Ganis.
Kept the Andorhal normality reveal intact and only trimmed duplicate logistics phrasing.
Polish draft was already lean; wordcount reduction landed below target because only high-confidence cuts survived the voice check.
